## Decision Summary

One sentence describing the design decision behind this change.

## Issue Link

Closes #N

## Checklist

- [ ] `solid-clean-reviewer` and `human-style-reviewer` were run.
- [ ] Full test suite is green.
- [ ] Commits are atomic and respect the <=5 files guideline.
- [ ] No hardcoded business tuning values were introduced.
- [ ] English-only content is maintained.
- [ ] Diff was reviewed and approved before commit.
